story.description: As a user, I want to register for a new account with my email and password
story.acceptance_criteria:
- User should be able to enter email and password
    - Password must be at least 8 characters
    - Email must be valid format
    - User should receive confirmation email
    - Duplicate email registration should be rejected

test_cases.title: Successful User Registration with Valid Credentials
test_cases.description: Verify a user can successfully register with a unique, valid email and a password meeting minimum length requirements, and receives a confirmation email.
steps: Navigate to the user registration page.
Enter a unique, valid email address (e.g., 'newuser@example.com').
Enter a strong password that meets the 8-character minimum (e.g., 'MySecureP@ssword123').
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button.
Check the inbox of 'newuser@example.com' for a confirmation email.
test_cases.expected_result: User account is successfully created, the user is redirected to a success page or logged in automatically, and a confirmation email is received in the provided email inbox.

test_cases.title: Attempt Registration with Password Less Than 8 Characters
test_cases.description: Verify that the system prevents user registration when the provided password is less than the required 8 characters.
steps: Navigate to the user registration page.
Enter a unique, valid email address (e.g., 'shortpassworduser@example.com').
Enter a password with less than 8 characters (e.g., 'short1').
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button.
test_cases.expected_result: An error message indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long is displayed, and the user account is not created.

test_cases.title: Attempt Registration with Invalid Email Format
test_cases.description: Verify that the system prevents user registration when the provided email address does not conform to a valid email format.
steps: Navigate to the user registration page.
Enter an invalid email address (e.g., 'invalid-email', 'user@.com', 'user@domain').
Enter a valid password (e.g., 'ValidP@ssword1').
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button.
test_cases.expected_result: An error message indicating an invalid email format is displayed, and the user account is not created.

test_cases.title: Attempt Registration with Already Registered Email
test_cases.description: Verify that the system prevents user registration when an email address that is already registered is used.
steps: Pre-condition: Ensure an account with email 'existing@example.com' and password 'ExistingP@ss1' already exists in the system.
Navigate to the user registration page.
Enter the already registered email address (e.g., 'existing@example.com').
Enter a valid password (e.g., 'NewValidP@ss2').
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button.
test_cases.expected_result: An error message indicating that the email address is already registered (or similar) is displayed, and the user account is not created.

test_cases.title: Successful Registration with Password Exactly 8 Characters
test_cases.description: Verify that a user can successfully register when providing a password that is exactly 8 characters long, meeting the minimum boundary condition.
steps: Navigate to the user registration page.
Enter a unique, valid email address (e.g., 'eightcharpw@example.com').
Enter a password with exactly 8 characters (e.g., 'P@ssword').
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button.
Check the inbox of 'eightcharpw@example.com' for a confirmation email.
test_cases.expected_result: User account is successfully created, the user is redirected to a success page or logged in automatically, and a confirmation email is received in the provided email inbox.

test_cases.title: Successful Registration with Email Containing Allowed Special Characters
test_cases.description: Verify that a user can successfully register with an email address containing allowed special characters in the local part (e.g., '+', '.', '-').
steps: Navigate to the user registration page.
Enter a unique, valid email address with allowed special characters (e.g., 'user.name+alias@example.com').
Enter a valid password (e.g., 'SecureP@ss3').
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button.
Check the inbox of 'user.name+alias@example.com' for a confirmation email.
test_cases.expected_result: User account is successfully created, the user is redirected to a success page or logged in automatically, and a confirmation email is received in the provided email inbox.
